1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in Drammen with area > 5000 m²

3.description: get 200-year flood zones (flomareal gjentaksintervall=200) intersecting Drammen extent

4.description: get quick-clay kartleggingsomrade intersecting Drammen extent

5.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year flood zones (membership)

6.description: compute parcel centroids for distance calculations

7.description: compute distances from parcel centroids to quick-clay polygons

9.description: sort parcels by min distance ascending with teigid tie-breaker

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%'

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal,0) > 5000;

1.description: get Drammen municipality row (kommunenummer and geometry) to use as spatial/muncipality filter

2.description: select parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m² (prefilter by municipality code/area) to reduce parcel set

3.description: select 200-year flood zone polygons limited to Drammen extent

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year flood zones

5.description: select quick-clay hazard zones limited to Drammen extent

6.description: compute distance from each affected parcel to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel with MIN(distance) as distance_m

8.description: sort parcels by distance_m ascending (tie-breaker by parcel id if needed)

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 returned 0 rows before the plan was complete. Treat this as an empty intermediate result and revise the plan, filter, join, table choice, or predicate.
